g.text: Use high accuracy resistors for op-amps!!

g.desc: Use high accuracy resistors for op-amps!!

g.text: For all the modules in the schematic unused pins are not shown

g.desc: For all the modules in the schematic unused pins are not shown

g.text: In case of experimenting with frequencies > 4hz the low-pass Fc must be adjusted

g.desc: In case of experimenting with frequencies > 4hz the low-pass Fc must be adjusted

g.text: The STM32 used in this project has a built-in reference voltage buffer, so the use of

g.desc: The STM32 used in this project has a built-in reference voltage buffer, so the use of

g.text: the external ADA4528 for section 3 of this schematic is not necessary. The pots

g.desc: the external ADA4528 for section 3 of this schematic is not necessary. The pots

g.text: can be connected to the "ADC Vref out" pin directly.

g.desc: can be connected to the "ADC Vref out" pin directly.

g.text: The "Boost 8 click" should be modified as follows (refer to the LT1946 datasheet):

g.desc: The "Boost 8 click" should be modified as follows (refer to the LT1946 datasheet):

g.text: 1. For the positive supply: R2 - 18k, R1 - 470k

g.desc: 1. For the positive supply: R2 - 18k, R1 - 470k

g.text: 2. For the negative supply: R2 - 20k, R1 - 510k

g.desc: 2. For the negative supply: R2 - 20k, R1 - 510k
